
### `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/refactor.md`

```markdown
# Refactor Task

## Goal

What should be improved internally?

## Current Problem

Describe the current code/design issue.

## Proposed Direction

Describe the intended improvement.

## Scope

- [ ] Included item 1
- [ ] Included item 2

## Out of Scope

- Item not included in this refactor

## Risk Areas

What could accidentally break?

## Testing Plan

- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added if behavior is clarified or protected
- [ ] Manual QA completed if scanner behavior may be affected

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Code is easier to understand or maintain
- [ ] External behavior is unchanged unless explicitly stated
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] README/docs updated if needed
